title: POV: You Just Unlocked Ritual x Masonry
meta: Vertical 9:16 reel, ~10s. Featured brand: Ritual. Inspired by mobileeditingclub (DSLr0gzCHof).
concept: A fast, satisfying POV reel for Ritual vitamins: you just figured out how to generate your product content in Masonry. The hook is a relatable lifestyle portrait of a woman holding a Ritual capsule up to her eye, grinning. Then the screen floods with 'Yes, that's Masonry': a floating capsule on a clean gray background, a capsule pile macro, a tweezer product shot, a branded card mockup. Every shot looks like a six-figure studio day. All Masonry.
audio: Upbeat, punchy trending audio. No voiceover. On-screen text is the full narrative.

beats.ost: POV: You finally learned how to generate your brand content with Masonry
beats.visual: Two-frame sequence: woman holding a Ritual Omega-3 capsule up playfully, then tilting it toward the camera. Bright, relatable, lifestyle energy. Text builds across both frames.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 0-1: 'POV: You finally learned how to generate content with AI' two-frame lifestyle hook.

beats.visual: Cut to a Ritual Essential capsule floating on a clean light gray background, perfect studio lighting, crisp capsule detail. Two cuts hold the reveal.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 2-3: 'Yes, that's AI' on the floating green capsule, two cuts.

beats.visual: Minimalist flat-lay: Ritual packaging and small print card on a neutral background. Editorial and brand-perfect.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 4: 'Yes, that's AI' on the packaging and print flat-lay.

beats.visual: Natural ingredient macro: spirulina or algae texture, rich green, hyperreal close-up mirroring Ritual's ingredient transparency story.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 5: 'Yes, that's AI' on the natural ingredient macro.

beats.visual: Model close-up placing a capsule on her tongue, freckled skin, warm natural light. Lifestyle meets editorial.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 6: 'Yes, that's AI' on the lifestyle model close-up.

beats.visual: Capsule pile macro: dozens of Ritual capsules filling the frame, each catching the light differently. Tactile and satisfying.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 7: 'Yes, that's AI' on the capsule pile macro.

beats.visual: Tweezer holding a single capsule over a plain background: precise, minimal, catalog-quality product shot.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 8: 'Yes, that's AI' on the product tweezer shot.

beats.visual: Final frame: Ritual bottle and branded product card on a warm cream background. Full brand system, no shoot required.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 9: 'Yes, that's AI' on the final branded bottle and card mockup.

notes: Ritual is a stand-in demo brand: D2C vitamins with distinctive minimalist packaging and strong ingredient transparency storytelling. All imagery is to be generated and assembled in Masonry. No media has been generated yet: generation is gated on separate approval per project policy.
